description: Trigger reliability evals. Tests whether the skill activates on relevant prompts (should-trigger) and stays dormant on adjacent prompts (should-not-trigger). Separate from output quality testing in evals.json and evals_v2.json.

evals.prompt: Run a full account review on our Google Ads account.
evals.rationale: Explicit Google Ads mention + audit intent — clearest possible trigger.

evals.prompt: Our CPA has gone up a lot this month. Can you take a look?
evals.rationale: Implicit trigger — no mention of Google Ads, but CPA is a PPC metric. Should activate.

evals.prompt: Leads are down this week compared to last week. What's going on?
evals.rationale: Implicit trigger — no platform named. In a law firm PPC context, this routes to Google Ads diagnosis.

evals.prompt: This account feels off. Can you dig in?
evals.rationale: Vague brief but PPC-context phrase. Listed as trigger phrase in prior description — should still activate.

evals.prompt: Do a search term review for the last 30 days.
evals.rationale: Search term review is a Google Ads task. Implicit activation without naming the platform.

evals.prompt: Why is this campaign not spending? We have a $200/day budget but it's only using $40.
evals.rationale: Campaign spend underdelivery is a Google Ads diagnosis task. No platform named but unambiguously PPC.

evals.prompt: Run a GAQL query to pull 30-day campaign performance.
evals.rationale: GAQL is Google Ads-specific. Should trigger immediately.

evals.prompt: Check if our conversion tracking is set up correctly.
evals.rationale: Implicit — conversion tracking audit is a core skill task. No platform named but routing is clear in law firm PPC context.

evals.prompt: We just onboarded a new client — can you do a first review of their account?
evals.rationale: New account audit (Tree 5). No platform named but 'account' in law firm PPC agency context = Google Ads.

evals.prompt: What's our impression share looking like and why are we losing auctions?
evals.rationale: Impression share is a Google Ads metric. Should trigger even without the platform name.

evals.prompt: Write a Facebook ad for our family law campaign targeting divorced adults 35-55.
evals.rationale: Facebook/Meta ads — explicitly different platform. Skill covers Google Ads only.

evals.prompt: Can you help me write a blog post about child custody laws in Michigan?
evals.rationale: Content creation / SEO — no PPC context. Should not activate.

evals.prompt: Pull our AgencyAnalytics report for this month and format it for the client.
evals.rationale: Client reporting via AgencyAnalytics — explicitly excluded in skill description.

evals.prompt: What keywords should we target for a new immigration law campaign?
evals.rationale: Keyword research for a new campaign — excluded. Skill covers diagnosis and optimization, not campaign creation.

evals.prompt: Can you improve the SEO on our landing page? We need better organic rankings.
evals.rationale: SEO — explicitly excluded in skill description.

evals.prompt: Set up a new Google Ads campaign for our personal injury practice.
evals.rationale: Campaign creation — excluded. Even though Google Ads is named, the task is creation not analysis.
